title: Velvety Almond Turkish Stir-fry
description: A nutty and velvety post-workout dish featuring tender chicken breasts cooked in a flavorful almond sauce.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 8-10 minutes total.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside. In the same pan, add chopped almonds and sauté for 2-3 minutes until lightly golden.
Add onion to the pan and cook until soft, then stir in minced garlic and tomato paste. Cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
Return chicken to the pan with almond mixture. Pour soy sauce and lemon juice over the top of the chicken. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Lower heat to medium-low and simmer for about 10 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly, stirring occasionally.
Add cayenne pepper if desired and stir in more salt and pepper as needed. Remove from heat and serve hot with additional lemon wedges on the side.
